auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Klazify API key used with the Authorization: Bearer header. Create or copy it from the Klazify dashboard after starting a free trial: https://www.klazify.com/register

actions.name: categorize_url
actions.description: Categorize a website URL with Klazify and return the aggregated domain enrichment overview.

url.description: The website URL or email address to enrich with Klazify.

inputSchema.description: Input for the Klazify all-in-one categorization action.

anyOf.description: The normalized domain URL returned by Klazify.
The hosted logo URL when available.

name.description: The category path returned by Klazify.

anyOf.description: The confidence score between 0 and 1 when provided.
The IAB category identifier or label when provided.

raw.description: The raw category payload returned by Klazify.

anyOf.description: The Facebook profile URL when available.
The Twitter or X profile URL when available.
The Instagram profile URL when available.
The YouTube channel URL when available.
The LinkedIn profile URL when available.
The GitHub profile URL when available.
The Pinterest profile URL when available.
The Medium profile URL when available.

raw.description: The raw social media payload returned by Klazify.

anyOf.description: Normalized social media links returned by Klazify.

raw.description: The raw domain payload returned by Klazify.

anyOf.description: The company name when available.
The company city when available.
The company state or region code when available.
The company country code when available.
The employee range when available.
Revenue returned as a string.
Revenue returned as a number.
The company revenue value when available.
Raised amount returned as a string.
Raised amount returned as a number.
The total funding amount when available.

tags.description: The company tags returned by Klazify.

tech.description: The company technologies returned by Klazify.

raw.description: The raw company payload returned by Klazify.

anyOf.description: Normalized company profile data returned by Klazify.
The registration date when available.
The number of days since registration when available.
The expiration date when available.
The number of days remaining until expiration when available.

raw.description: The raw domain registration payload returned by Klazify.

anyOf.description: Normalized domain registration metadata returned by Klazify.

similarDomains.description: The similar domains returned by Klazify when available.

raw.description: The raw Klazify response payload.
